title: uVidNova Unit Cost Table
description: Array of unit cost entries by asset_type. Used in the deterministic cost formula: cost = unit_cost × physical_quantity × factors.

asset_type.description: Must match an entry in data/taxonomy.json.

physical_unit.description: Unit of the physical quantity (m2, MW, km, beds, units, etc.).

usd_per_unit_low.description: Low end of unit cost in USD.

usd_per_unit_central.description: Central (best estimate) unit cost in USD.

usd_per_unit_high.description: High end of unit cost in USD.

source_code.description: Primary authoritative source for this cost estimate.

vintage_year.description: Year of the source data. Used for inflation-adjustment flag.

notes.description: Any scope qualifications, regional basis, or methodology notes.

heritage_premium_multiplier_low.description: For heritage assets: low end of conservation-premium multiplier (1.8x–3.0x). Only present for heritage asset types.

heritage_premium_multiplier_high.description: For heritage assets: high end of conservation-premium multiplier. Only present for heritage asset types.
